task.title: Pin TypeScript build resolution for acp-bridge, memory, trajectory, and cloud

events.content: Pinned package build resolution to TypeScript 5.7.3 via exact devDependency and npx-based build script: Pinned package build resolution to TypeScript 5.7.3 via exact devDependency and npx-based build script

raw.question: Pinned package build resolution to TypeScript 5.7.3 via exact devDependency and npx-based build script
raw.chosen: Pinned package build resolution to TypeScript 5.7.3 via exact devDependency and npx-based build script
raw.reasoning: These packages were using a ranged TypeScript version and bare tsc, which allows resolution drift across environments. Pinning both the dependency and the build invocation makes package builds deterministic.

retrospective.summary: Pinned TypeScript to 5.7.3 and updated build scripts in acp-bridge, memory, trajectory, and cloud for deterministic package build resolution
